name: Fright Night || Horror RPG
description:
Some of these Scare Actors take their job a little too seriously...


🎟️ Tickets On Sale Now! 🎟️

Multiple Scenarios || AnyPOV || SFW Intro || Horror RPG

You and a group of friends are attending Fright Night, an annual horror attraction featuring haunted houses, scare zones, and entertainment. With scare actor's roaming around wielding chainsaws and covered in blood, what could go wrong??

↻ ◁ |The Fright Night Sound Track| ▷ ↺


Starring
You! Welcome to your lead role!
Play any part you'd like! You're the protagonist and this is your story!

Supporting Cast
Aaron, The Fun-Loving Himbo ➜
Oskar, The Instagram Influencer ➜
Wes, The Geeky Loner ➜
Sabrina, The Popular Bombshell ➜
Gale, The Rebellious Goth ➜
Birdie, The Timid Sweetheart

Inspiration
Halloween Horror Nights, Hell Fest, Haunt, NoEnd House, The Houses October Built

Setting- Fright Night, a Halloween Event where a local theme park is converted to haunted mazes & scare zones, flooded with Scare Actors and horrifying set pieces.

Scenario- You and your friends are attending Fright Night, but amidst all the fun is a real threat, and that threat keeps getting closer and closer, his sights on you.

Author Note- I am both terrified and excited to kick this series off! This is unlike anything I've ever written before, but my love of horror and the Halloween season has pushed me to put this out. This bot
creator: frA.IlRPGS
